title.zh: 美国过去7天 TikTok 带货爆品 Top 20
title.en: US TikTok Top 20 Viral Commerce Products, Past 7 Days

summary.zh: 过去7天美国 TikTok 带货爆品更集中在平价功效个护、演示型家居小工具、手机便携配件与杯具生态件。
summary.en: Over the past 7 days, US TikTok viral commerce concentrated more on affordable functional beauty, demonstrable home gadgets, portable phone accessories, and tumbler ecosystem items.

highlight.en: Demonstration value matters more than traditional necessity

recommendedActions.zh: 把 Top 20 按内容模板拆成对比型与问题解决型
recommendedActions.en: Split the Top 20 into comparison-led and problem-solving content templates

recommendedActions.zh: 补一轮 TikTok 热品到 Amazon 承接的交叉验证
recommendedActions.en: Run another cross-check on which TikTok winners also convert on Amazon

watchReason.zh: 周度 TikTok 带货榜适合持续监控内容爆点与购买触发词变化。
watchReason.en: A weekly TikTok commerce ranking is useful for monitoring content spikes and purchase-trigger language over time.
